feedback.user_correction: Use KEYS ["ctrl","t"]. Don't click the + button.
Prefer CLICK by element name. For CLICK_XY, read grid lines carefully — don't guess coordinates.
KEYS ["ctrl","l"] to focus address bar, TYPE_TEXT url, KEYS ["enter"]. Or use OPEN_URL.
KEYS ["ctrl","w"]. Don't click the tiny X.
KEYS ["ctrl","tab"] for next tab. KEYS ["ctrl","1"] through ["ctrl","9"] for specific tabs.
KEYS ["pgdn"] or ["down"] or ["space"]. Don't click things that aren't visible — scroll first.
Use TYPE_IN with element name. If not available, CLICK the field first, verify focus, then TYPE_TEXT.
After clicking, check next screenshot. If page didn't change, click missed — try CLICK by name or re-read grid.
Always use OPEN_APP. NEVER use KEYS with Win key. NEVER click desktop icons or Start menu.
KEYS ["alt","left"]. Don't click the back arrow button.
KEYS ["f5"] or ["ctrl","r"]. Don't click the refresh button.
KEYS ["ctrl","a"]. Don't drag-select with mouse.
After opening dropdown, use KEYS ["down"]/["up"] to navigate, ["enter"] to select. Don't click options.
After CLICK_XY, check next screenshot. Same screen = missed. Try CLICK by element name, or re-read grid. Never repeat same coords.
KEYS ["enter"] for OK/Yes. KEYS ["escape"] for Cancel/No. Don't click dialog buttons.
KEYS ["ctrl","f"], TYPE_TEXT the term, KEYS ["enter"] for next match. Don't scroll looking manually.
Position cursor with CLICK_XY, then KEYS ["shift","f10"] for context menu. Navigate with arrows + enter.
KEYS ["alt","space"] then ["x"]. Or KEYS ["f11"] for fullscreen in browsers.
KEYS ["ctrl","a"] select, ["ctrl","c"] copy, ["ctrl","v"] paste. Don't drag-select.
X = horizontal (top labels). Y = vertical (left labels). Find nearest grid lines, interpolate center. State coords in <thinking> before acting.
Keyboard shortcuts are ALWAYS more reliable than clicking small UI targets. Use them whenever possible.
